people.title: Co-founder, Lekana
people.role: Pilot lead and fuel station business owner
people.intro: I run a fuel station. I am also a co-founder of Lekana, the tool we built to fix the reconciliation problem I lived with for years.

people.title: Co-founder, Lekana
people.role: Product, partnerships and the technical side
people.intro: Twenty-five years building digital products. Lekana is a TimeShift product from my company Bethink. It is the build I am proudest of.

people.title: Client Experience, Lekana
people.role: Client experience, UX design and research
people.bestFor: Client experience, onboarding, design and UX feedback.
people.intro: I bridge the gap between what people need and what businesses deliver, making their digital experience easier, faster, and clearer. My work spans UX and design, user research, and AI automation for clients like Momentum, Elite Wealth, and Discovery.
